pgaAgencies.description: JSON array of PGA agency codes requiring review (e.g. ["FDA","USDA","EPA"])

htsCode.description: Confirmed HTS code for the goods being imported

goodsDescription.description: Plain English description of the goods being imported

poNumber.description: Purchase order number for this shipment

pgaStatus.description: Overall PGA screening result: APPROVED, MAY_HOLD, REFUSED, or NOT_REQUIRED
